name: Cold Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree all ingredients, except scallion, in a blender.
2. Taste the mixture and add a little more water if too spicy.
3. Strain through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh strainer, discarding any vegetable pieces that did not puree fully.
4. Chill overnight.
5. Serve chilled in glasses or bowls with diced scallion floating on top.
